```{r}
#| label: tbl-base-acs
#| cache: true
#| cache.comments: false
#| dependson: basetabfunc
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline characteristics - ACS"
#| tbl-pos: "H"

contdig <- 0
catdig <- 0

tab <- sdatami %>%
  filter(case != "Comparator" | is.na(case)) %>%
  count(sos_com_excl_angipci, .drop = F) %>%
  mutate(n = paste0(n, " (", fn(n / sum(n) * 100, catdig), ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(sos_com_excl_angipci), values_from = n) %>%
  mutate(
    var = "N (%)",
    level = NA,
    p = NA,
    p2 = NA
  ) %>%
  select(var, level, No, Yes, p, p2)

levstrata <- levels(sdatami %>% pull(sos_com_excl_angipci))
tabtmp <- sapply(tabvars,
  FUN = basetabfunc_inner, data = sdatami %>% filter(case != "Comparator" | is.na(case)),
  stratavar = "sos_com_excl_angipci", catdig = catdig, contdig = contdig
)
tabtmp <- bind_rows(tabtmp)

tab <- bind_rows(tab, tabtmp)

tab <- tab %>%
  mutate(
    # if recoding or categorizing will still get org label
    var_tmp = str_replace_all(var, "(_cat2|_cat)", "")
  )

tab <- left_join(tab,
  metavars %>%
    select(variable, label, unit),
  by = c("var_tmp" = "variable")
) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = coalesce(label, var_tmp),
    Variable = if_else(!is.na(unit),
      paste0(Variable, " (", unit, ")"),
      Variable
    ),
    Variable = if_else(!is.na(level) & !is.na(Variable),
      paste0(Variable, " ", level),
      coalesce(Variable, paste0("  ", level))
    ),
    # small fixes
    Variable = str_replace_all(Variable, fixed("Disposable income (100 SEK)"), "Income")
  )

cn <- c("Variable", "Included", "Excluded due to MI", "SD", "P-value")

# excel
tab <- tab %>%
  select(Variable, No:p2)

make_one_xlsxsheet(tab, colnames = cn)

tab <- tab %>%
  mutate(
    # so no probs
    Variable = sanitize_text(Variable),
    Variable = str_replace_all(Variable, fixed("²"), "\\textsuperscript{2}"),
    Variable = str_replace_all(Variable, fixed("$>$="), "$\\geq$"),
    Variable = str_replace_all(Variable, fixed("$<$="), "$\\leq$")
  )

indent_rows <- tab %>%
  mutate(
    indent_rows = str_detect(Variable, "  "),
    rows = row_number()
  ) %>%
  filter(indent_rows) %>%
  pull(rows)

cn <- sanitize_text(cn)

default_kable(tab,
  font_size = 7.5,
  longtable = TRUE,
  escape = FALSE,
  col.names = cn
) %>%
  add_indent(indent_rows) %>%
  footnote(
    footnote_order = c("general", "symbol", "alphabet"),
    general_title = "",
    general = c(
      "Categorical variables are presented with n (%) and continuous variables with median [q1-q3]."
    ),
    threeparttable = T
  )
```
